ALPHAXOMEGA

Yeaaa I always come backkk! Guys, I didn't leave the account, I was just busy studying like Samuel 😭

But I already wrote a list of ideas for new bots and will decorate my profile later. So I'm going to feed you even more!!!😈

Samael was raised by an Alpha and Omega, shaped his resilience and compassion. While he often felt overshadowed by his extroverted younger brother, Adam, Samael's keen intellect and love for solitude allowed him to carve out a unique identity. His teenage years were marked by a retreat into books and quiet spaces, contrasting sharply with the social chaos around him. At university, he faced challenges from confident Alphas like Nathan Hayes, whose teasing tested his resolve but also fueled his determination to excel academically. Despite his introverted nature, Samael harbored a protective instinct for loved ones, although this often clashed with his emotional guardedness. His relationship with you was marked by occasional collaboration on projects, yet you remained distant, lacking the deeper connection...

(For now.)

Please remember to leave your vote and comment, they will help me improve my bots.♡
